chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 73 of 2008 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For final arguments: 30-08-2024 Mr. Laeeq Ahmed, Advocate for the Plaintiff. Mr. Ayaz Ali, Advocate for Defendants No.2,4&5. Razia Sultana, Qamar Sultana, Fahmida, Rubina, Naila and Arifuddin are present in person. ============= An application under Order 23 Rule 3 C.P.C. has been filed by the Plaintiff and the Defendants. The parties are all siblings and the children of Abu Bakar Hamid Arbani and Roshan Bibi. Their parents died on 08.09.1990 and 25.01.1997, respectively. The Suit was filed by one of the siblings, Naila, against her brother and sisters, seeking a declaration that she was entitled to a certain share of her parents estate, details of which are contained in the application. The siblings have reached an amicable settlement and therefore a prayer has been made by the Plaintiff that he be permitted to withdraw the Suit. Razia Sultana, Qamar Sultana, Fahmida, Rubina, Naila and Arifuddin, are all present in person with their counsels and endorse and confirm that they have settled the dispute between them. I notice that a number is yet to be allocated to the application. The office may do so. Given the above, the application is allowed. The Suit stands dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE
